response.overview: A completely digital video installation of intense plasticity and a rigorous reinterpretation of the European avant-garde from the beginning of the 20th century to the present. The images of Duchamp, Ingres, Pellizza da Volpedo, Man Ray, Fontana, Bacon, of the Colombian Botero, find themselves surprisingly, with the language of digital electronics, in another poetic and iconographic dimension.
response.title: La ruota di Duchamp
